sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103215" key="tessarakaideka/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεσσᾰρᾰκαι-δεκάδωρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<sense id="n103215.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δῶρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fourteen hand-breadths long,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.114</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
